description: This file defines a React functional component named AppShell that manages the layout of a web application, including a Navbar, Sidebar, and main content area. It handles responsiveness for mobile and desktop views with toggle functionality for mobile sidebar visibility.

methods.name: AppShell
methods.description: React functional component that orchestrates layout including navbar, sidebar, and main content, with mobile toggle functionality.

methods.name: handleMobileSidebarToggle
methods.description: Callback to toggle the mobile sidebar open or closed.

methods.name: handleMobileSidebarClose
methods.description: Callback to close the mobile sidebar.
